name: CancelOrder
description: Customer wants to cancel a recent product order or purchase before it has been delivered or installed — including equipment orders, package orders, or service orders they've changed their mind about. This is not a contract cancellation, engineer appointment cancellation, or equipment return.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to cancel my order
How do I cancel an order I placed?
Cancel my {orderProductType} order please
I need to cancel the order I made today
Can I cancel an order before it's been dispatched?
I've changed my mind about my {orderProductType} order
I placed an order by mistake and need to cancel it
Is it too late to cancel my {orderProductType} order?
I ordered a {orderProductType} but I don't want it anymore
Cancel my recent order
I want to stop my {orderProductType} order from being delivered
How do I cancel an order that hasn't arrived yet?
I need to cancel — I ordered the wrong {orderProductType}
Can you cancel the {orderProductType} I ordered earlier today?
I don't need the {orderProductType} I ordered anymore
Please cancel my order with immediate effect
I made an order and I want to reverse it
I want to cancel my order and get a refund
Is there a way to cancel an order once it's been placed?
cancel order
